explanation: The property captures that in PCV or PSV modes, when an Inspiratory Pause is initiated by the GUI, the ventilator must wait for the current inspiration phase to end. At that point, if the Inspiratory Pause is still active, both inspiratory and expiratory valves will close and remain closed until the Inspiratory Pause is disengaged via the GUI.
decision1_substring: In PCV and PSV modes there shall be the possibility to initiate an Inspiratory Pause if it is set by the GUI: When the Inspiratory Pause is set by the GUI
decision2_substring: the ventilator shall wait for the end of the next inspiration phase, and if the Inspiratory Pause still required,
decision3_substring: both the inspiratory and expiratory valves will close until the inspiratory pause is stopped by the GUI.
output_structured_natural_language: whenever (PCVMode | PSVMode) & inspiratoryPauseButton, upon inspiratoryPhaseEnd & inspiratoryPauseButton, until !inspiratoryPauseButton, satisfy inValveClose & outValveClose

explanation: The property captures that in PCV or PSV modes, when an Inspiratory Pause is initiated by the GUI, the ventilator must wait for the current inspiration phase to end. At that point, if the Inspiratory Pause is still active, both inspiratory and expiratory valves will close and remain closed until the Inspiratory Pause is disengaged via the GUI.
decision1_substring: In PCV and PSV modes there shall be the possibility to initiate an Inspiratory Pause if it is set by the GUI: When the Inspiratory Pause is set by the GUI
decision2_substring: the ventilator shall wait for the end of the next inspiration phase, and if the Inspiratory Pause still required,
decision3_substring: both the inspiratory and expiratory valves will close until the inspiratory pause is stopped by the GUI.
output_structured_natural_language: whenever (PCVMode | PSVMode) & inspiratoryPauseButton, upon inspiratoryPhaseEnd & inspiratoryPauseButton, until !inspiratoryPauseButton, satisfy inValveClose & outValveClose

explanation: The property captures that in PCV or PSV modes, when an Inspiratory Pause is initiated by the GUI, the ventilator must wait for the current inspiration phase to end. At that point, if the Inspiratory Pause is still active, both inspiratory and expiratory valves will close and remain closed until the Inspiratory Pause is disengaged via the GUI.
decision1_substring: In PCV and PSV modes there shall be the possibility to initiate an Inspiratory Pause if it is set by the GUI: When the Inspiratory Pause is set by the GUI
decision2_substring: the ventilator shall wait for the end of the next inspiration phase, and if the Inspiratory Pause still required,
decision3_substring: both the inspiratory and expiratory valves will close until the inspiratory pause is stopped by the GUI.
